name: Patient 49
history: Complex strained family relationships. Father creates misery for others, expresses life dissatisfaction. Maternal grandmother had negative impact, especially on mother.
helpless_belief: I am trapped in family dysfunction
worthless_belief: I am bad for wishing they would die
intermediate_belief: My family's pain is a burden I carry.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'll never be free of their negative influence.
coping_strategies: Emotional distancing, guilt about distancing, morbid rumination.
situation: Reflecting on potential death of father and grandmother.
auto_thought: "Part of me wishes they would die so I can be free. That makes me a monster."
behavior: Withdraws from family contact, has intrusive thoughts, tells therapist but no one else.
